languages.text: Древний имплантационный трон, принадлежащий династии, был поврежден во время восстания Кунрада Войгтвира. Вольному Торговцу предстоит восстановить функционирование археотечного агрегата.
The ancient implantation throne belonging to the dynasty was damaged during Kunrad Voigtvir's mutiny. It is up to the Rogue Trader to restore the archeotech machine to working order.
languages.original_text: Древний имплантационный трон, принадлежащий династии, был поврежден во время восстания Кунрада Войгтвира. Вольному Торговцу предстоит восстановить функционирование археотечного агрегата.

traits.locale_text: The ancient implantation throne belonging to the dynasty was damaged during Kunrad Voigtvir's mutiny. It is up to the Rogue Trader to restore the archeotech machine to working order.

The ancient implantation throne belonging to the dynasty was damaged during Kunrad Voigtvir's mutiny. It is up to the Rogue Trader to restore the archeotech machine to working order.

languages.text: Der alte Implantationsthron der Dynastie wurde während Kunrad Voigtvirs Meuterei beschädigt. Nun ist es {mf|am Freihändler|an der Freihändlerin}, die Archäotech-Maschine zu reparieren.
languages.original_text: The ancient implantation throne belonging to the dynasty was damaged during Kunrad Voigtvir's mutiny. It is up to the Rogue Trader to restore the archeotech machine to working order.

traits.locale_text: Der alte Implantationsthron der Dynastie wurde während Kunrad Voigtvirs Meuterei beschädigt. Nun ist es {mf|am Freihändler|an der Freihändlerin}, die Archäotech-Maschine zu reparieren.

languages.text: L'antique fauteuil d'implantation de la dynastie avait été endommagé au cours de la mutinerie de Kunrad Voigtvir. {mf|Le libre-marchand|La libre-marchande} doit à présent remettre la machine archéotechnologique en état de marche.
languages.original_text: The ancient implantation throne belonging to the dynasty was damaged during Kunrad Voigtvir's mutiny. It is up to the Rogue Trader to restore the archeotech machine to working order.

traits.locale_text: L'antique fauteuil d'implantation de la dynastie avait été endommagé au cours de la mutinerie de Kunrad Voigtvir. {mf|Le libre-marchand|La libre-marchande} doit à présent remettre la machine archéotechnologique en état de marche.

languages.text: 王朝那古老的移植王座在昆拉德·维特威尔的叛乱期间受损。行商浪人有责任修复这件远古科技机器，让它恢复到正常状态。
languages.original_text: The ancient implantation throne belonging to the dynasty was damaged during Kunrad Voigtvir's mutiny. It is up to the Rogue Trader to restore the archeotech machine to working order.

traits.locale_text: 王朝那古老的移植王座在昆拉德·维特威尔的叛乱期间受损。行商浪人有责任修复这件远古科技机器，让它恢复到正常状态。

languages.text: El antiguo trono de implantación de la dinastía fue dañado durante el motín de Kunrad Voigtvir. Le corresponde a{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente restaurar esta pieza de arqueotecnología para que funcione.
languages.original_text: The ancient implantation throne belonging to the dynasty was damaged during Kunrad Voigtvir's mutiny. It is up to the Rogue Trader to restore the archeotech machine to working order.

traits.locale_text: El antiguo trono de implantación de la dinastía fue dañado durante el motín de Kunrad Voigtvir. Le corresponde a{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente restaurar esta pieza de arqueotecnología para que funcione.

languages.text: バイオニック・セクターの中央にある自由商人のインプラント玉座が、反乱軍によって損傷した。修復できるのはAltar-Templum-Calixis-Ex-17のScarlet Priestsのみである。
languages.original_text: The Free Merchant's Implant Throne in the centre of the Bionic Sector has been damaged by the Rebellion. It can only be repaired by the Scarlet Priests of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ex-17.

languages.text: Hanedanlığa ait kadim implantasyon tahtı, Kunrad Voigtvir'in isyanı sırasında hasar gördü. Arkeotek makinesini tekrar çalışır hâle getirmek Hür Tacir'in elinde.
languages.original_text: The ancient implantation throne belonging to the dynasty was damaged during Kunrad Voigtvir's mutiny. It is up to the Rogue Trader to restore the archeotech machine to working order.

traits.locale_text: Hanedanlığa ait kadim implantasyon tahtı, Kunrad Voigtvir'in isyanı sırasında hasar gördü. Arkeotek makinesini tekrar çalışır hâle getirmek Hür Tacir'in elinde.
